title: Signal Drift: Rooftop Relay
description: Swipe a rooftop receiver through static storms to lock onto drifting alien signals and chain clean captures before the skyline blacks out.

howToPlayJson.title: Signal Drift: Rooftop Relay
howToPlayJson.objective: Survive a 3-minute transmission run by dodging static hazards, riding the moving signal lane, and banking the highest decode score before three signal breaks end the run.

controls.outcome: Move the dish between skyline lanes to dodge incoming static, birds, and power surges.

controls.input: Keep your finger down while inside the glowing signal lane
controls.outcome: Decode the drifting transmission, build combo, and charge the score multiplier.

controls.input: Lift your finger before a Drift Flip hits
controls.outcome: Cash out the current multiplier safely instead of risking a full combo break.

steps: Start on a rooftop with four lanes and a faint alien broadcast drifting between them.
Swipe to dodge incoming static bursts and skyline hazards streaming downward in faster waves.
When the glowing signal lane passes under your dish, stay inside it to decode packets and raise your multiplier.
Every few seconds a Drift Flip retunes the broadcast to a new lane and reverses which pulse color is safe, forcing a fast route change.
If you stay locked through a Drift Flip, your multiplier jumps harder, but clipping any hazard or wrong-color pulse shatters the whole combo
Survive until the timer ends or lose after three signal breaks.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Score rises from time survived plus decoded packets. Staying inside the signal lane increases a combo multiplier up to 8x. Banking before a Drift Flip preserves the multiplier as points; riding through the flip risks a 2
tips: Watch the audio pitch: the signal hum rises as the lane is about to drift.
Wrong-color pulses become dangerous only after each Drift Flip, so read the sky before committing.
Short swipes are safer early; long greedy locks win leaderboard runs.
Banking a 5x combo is often better than losing an 8x chase.
Play with sound on: hazard clicks and retune stingers give earlier warning than the visuals.
